title: graellsia stylosa
intro: Graellsia stylosa, also known as the Spanish grape fern, is a rare and endangered species of fern found in the mountainous regions of northern Spain. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Graellsia stylosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe coughs, and aid in the treatment of bronchitis and other respiratory conditions. Graellsia stylosa is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
